# Some Thoughts Concerning Education

*[John Locke](../philosophers/locke.md) · 1693*

A practical treatise on education in which Locke draws out the consequences of the [blank slate](../glossary/tabula-rasa.md): character and mores are formed by habit and experience. The child becomes what education makes of it, placing upbringing well ahead of any innate nature.
